description: Style NoteA practical and stylish solution to managing your monetary essentials, this wallet from fiorelli is the perfect accessory for all your outfits. Handcrafted from premium leather, this piece is specially designed and created with the highest quality standards, ensuring that it will last for several years. Its classic styling and minimalistic detailing offers unbeatable understated style.nbsp; Product DetailsRed wallet with metal brand badge on the frontOne main zippered compartment with one plain and one zippered inner separatorSix credit card slots and a slip pocket on both the sidesnbsp; Guarantee: 1yrMaterials and CareLeatherWipe with damp cloth to remove dust SizeDimensions: 19 cm x 10 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
